de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<SourceElement>
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<SourceElement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionMethodReturn, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
    Enclosing class:
    ExecutionNodeReader

    public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<SourceElement>
implements IExecutionMethodReturn
    An implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn

        public ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn(IExecutionNode<?> parent,
                                       String name,
                                       String formatedPathCondition,
                                       boolean pathConditionChanged,
                                       String nameIncludingReturnValue,
                                       String signature,
                                       String signatureIncludingReturnValue,
                                       boolean returnValueComputed,
                                       String formatedMethodReturn)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
        name - The name of this node.
        formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
        pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
        nameIncludingReturnValue - The name including the return value.
        signature - The signature.
        signatureIncludingReturnValue - The signature including return value.
        returnValueComputed - Is the return value computed?
        formatedMethodReturn - The formated method return condition.
